From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>

Date: Tue, 25 Mar 2025 03:00:00 +0000
Subject: Important Update: New Pricing Plans for LlamaCloud
Message-ID: <g3_VdDgTTp2QK5QQaxASIQ@geopod-ismtpd-27>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="605840bddf12b12b64bc1190b230fc991b418bf0fdd14ec46d19ce408b44"

Dear LlamaCloud User,

After listening to your feedback, we're excited to roll out more
flexible pricing plans designed to fit every need!

Here's what's changing:

* Beginning Thursday, March 27th, all users will be moved to the
Free plan at the end of their current billing cycle.
* You can then upgrade to Starter or Pro for increased usage
limits.

To choose your plan:

* Go to LlamaCloud -> Settings -> Billing.
* Select the plan that best fits your workflow.

Image

Need help deciding? Reach out to us: support@runllama.ai.

Thank you for growing with us!

- The LlamaIndex Team

P.S. If you are an enterprise user, this email does not apply to
you.
